items.description:
Goal:
- Align Athena SSE progress semantics with agent-platform planning needs.

Acceptance:
- progress_step is documented
- server emits progress_step on normal, waiting, and error paths

subtasks.description: Freeze the minimal field set and event order.
Emit user-visible step flow without breaking existing SSE events.
Keep docs/api.md, checklists, and smoke scripts aligned with the final contract.
